name: CHOANAL ATRESIA

demographics.Etiology: failure of perforation of buccopharyngeal + oronasal membrane, which normally

dominant_finding: narrowing of choanal orifice to a width of < 3.4-3.7 mm (in children < 2 years of age)
discriminating_features: fusion of hard palate + vomer + ventral clivus with nasopharyngeal atresia
narrowing of choanal orifice to a width of < 3.4-3.7 mm (in children < 2 years of age)

general: fusion of hard palate + vomer + ventral clivus with nasopharyngeal atresia

bone / soft-tissue septum extending across posterior choanae
